assertions.reason: `dispatcher-envelope.test.ts` validated envelope creation at dispatch with required fields.
`dispatcher-envelope.test.ts` validated envelope immutability via service API constraints.
`dispatcher-envelope.test.ts` validated adapter envelope context fields are populated.
`dispatcher-envelope.test.ts` validated runs without envelopes are rejected.
`dispatcher-envelope.test.ts` validated workspace resolution from issue→project→workspace chain.
`dispatcher-envelope.test.ts` validated failed project workspace resolution rejects dispatch and emits `workspace_resolution_failed`.
`dispatcher-envelope.test.ts` validated `workspaceBindingMode` is set appropriately in envelope.
`dispatcher-envelope.test.ts` validated dispatch-time workspace verification rejects deleted/missing workspaces.

commands.observation: Vitest passed: 1 test file, 26 tests, 0 failures.

frictions.description: The test output included extensive embedded Postgres TRUNCATE cascade NOTICE logs, which added noise while reviewing evidence.
frictions.resolution: Used the final Vitest summary and targeted test mapping to determine assertion outcomes.
